intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), and P4 (Silver Guest) are not visible as established specimens. Only P3 (Pothos) is identifiable via the white rabbit anchor, though the plant itself is severely compromised.

inventory_reconciliation.p1_string_of_nickels: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.p2_mexican_mint: Systemic Loss: No foliage detected in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.p3_pothos: Degraded: Anchor present, but primary foliage is absent/lost.

plant_audit.p1_yellow_pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.p2_black_pot: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.p3_pothos_black_pot: Contains white rabbit anchor. A single, thin, chlorotic sprout is visible in the soil, likely a remnant or late-stage germination attempt.
plant_audit.p4_shared_black_pot: Merged with P2/P3 space; no distinct specimen identified.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, moist, and appears undisturbed. No fungal blooms or surface debris beyond the white rabbit anchor.
biome_observations.incidental_growth: One singular, pale green sprout observed in the P3 pot area.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t3: Initial state shows bare soil in all pots.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Emergence of a single, thin, pale sprout in the P3 pot.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Sprout remains static; no further development or additional growth.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The biome has suffered a near-total loss of the registered specimens. The current 'sprout' is insufficient to sustain the registry's claims. The environment is currently a 'dead' or 'reset' state.

anomalies: New Introduction: Single, uncatalogued sprout in P3.
Systemic Loss: All registered plants (P1, P2, P4) are absent.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic failure of the botanical registry. The pots are essentially devoid of the expected flora. A single, weak, chlorotic sprout in the P3 pot is the only biological activity present. The environment appears to have been cleared or suffered a total die-off, with the white rabbit anchor serving as the only constant in an otherwise empty biome.
